docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-14-2026 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-04-2026 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76808213) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, EBONY AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.; A DELAWARE CORPORATION DOES 1 THROUGH 50, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-07-2026 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-06-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-15-2025
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 76808213) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, EBONY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 78487612)
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 76808213) TO PLAINTIFF JACKSON, EBONY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-07-2026 CONTINUED TO MAR-04-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-14-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
